creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 195904
x11/tint: Update to 16.6

Hello,
the attached patch updates x11/tint to version 16.6. This is a minor release without any notable changes. Changes to the port are:

  * Just version bump

Changes to the application are:

  * Some bugfixes
  * Add option to sort taskbar by application name

This changes was tested with Pouriere against FreeBSD 11.1 and 11.2. And I've run with the new version for several hours without problems.
